regions.text: People need work and play for the body and for the mind. They need music and dancing, rest and change.
They need books and talk with other men: with old friends and new people. They need new knowledge to keep their old knowledge clear and living.
A friend is someone you know and love and with whom you have much in common. dancing: moving in time to music.
FUTURE: will dance. PRESENT: dance(s). PAST: danced.
